rules.rule_summary: Fences in front yards must not exceed four feet in height.
rules.verbatim_text: Each fence and/or wall does not exceed four feet in height in a front yard.

rules.rule_summary: Fences in side and rear yards must not exceed eight feet in height.
rules.verbatim_text: Each fence and/or wall shall not exceed eight feet in height in side and rear yards.
rules.verdict_logic: WHEN (height_ft <= 8 AND location IN ('side', 'back')) THEN pass

rules.rule_summary: Fences in required exterior side setbacks must not exceed four feet in height.
rules.verbatim_text: Fences and/or walls in required exterior side setbacks shall not exceed four feet in height.

rules.rule_summary: On a corner lot, fences in the required exterior side or rear setback abutting a street must not exceed four feet in height.
rules.verbatim_text: On a corner lot, no fence and/or wall shall exceed four feet in height in the required exterior side or rear setback abutting a street.
rules.verdict_logic: WHEN (height_ft <= 4 AND location = 'street_side' AND corner_lot = true) THEN pass
